data.name: Magic Pussy: Chapter 1
data.detailed_description:
欢迎来到闷热的《魔力宝贝》世界，这是一个成人约会模拟游戏，设置在一个令人着迷的幻想世界。在这个令人陶醉的领域，你将有机会探索迷人的女巫的肉体欲望，每个人都有自己独特的背景和诱人的故事可以分享。当你学习诱人的咒语和魔法时，你将沉浸在她们不可抗拒的魅力中，这将帮助你赢得她们的心，满足她们最深的欲望。



当你穿越神秘的学院时，在磨练你的魔法技能的同时，与这里迷人的居民形成热情的联系。当你在浪漫和欲望的迷宫中努力工作时，你将参与热辣的邂逅、调情的戏谑和迷人的试探。记住，你在游戏中做出的选择将决定你的命运，塑造你与这些迷人的女巫的关系，并决定等待你的蒸汽体验。



在这个迷人的约会模拟中，你的任务是勾引和引诱你进入最迷人的女巫的心中和床上。揭开她们的秘密，掌握神奇的诱惑艺术，并发现等待你的是难以言喻的快乐。你是否有能力和魅力来征服这些诱人的女巫的心，或者你会被留下渴望更多？只有当你踏上这段热气腾腾、令人神魂颠倒的冒险时，时间才会告诉你。

特点：


[list］
  • 仅限成人的内容： 沉浸在为成人玩家专门设计的诱人的成熟约会模拟体验中。
  • 魔法世界宇宙： 探索一个迷人和神秘的环境，丰富的传说和灵感来自于魔法世界的巫术和魔法师。
  • 多样化的人物： 与一群迷人的女巫打交道，每个人都有自己独特的个性、背景和欲望。
  • 诱人的法术： 掌握各种诱人的法术和魔法，这将有助于你赢得女巫们的心。
  • 分支的故事情节： 在一个动态的叙事中，有多条分支路径，受你在整个游戏中做出的选择影响。
  • 蒸汽的邂逅： 当你与迷人的角色建立激情联系时，体验感性和亲密的时刻。
  • 关系发展： 通过有意义的对话、选择和行动，发展和加深你与女巫的关系。
  • 引人入胜的游戏玩法： 参与小型游戏和辅助任务，测试你的魔法能力和决策技能，为整体体验增加深度。
    ...

data.short_description: 揭开魔法世界宇宙中仅限成人的约会模拟游戏的神秘世界。探索迷人女巫的肉欲，学习诱人的咒语，并建立热情的联系。您的选择决定了您的命运；诱惑并引诱您进入迷人女巫的心灵和床铺。
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 日文, 韓文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 繁體中文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.name: Magic Pussy: Chapter 1
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to the sultry world of Magic Pussy, an adult-only dating sim set in a mesmerizing fantasy universe. In this enthralling realm, you'll have the opportunity to explore the carnal desires of bewitching witches, each with their own unique backgrounds and tantalizing stories to share. Immerse yourself in their irresistible charms as you learn alluring spells and enchantments that will help you win their hearts and fulfill their deepest desires.



As you navigate through the mystical academy, form passionate connections with its enchanting residents while honing your magical skills. Participate in steamy encounters, flirtatious banter, and spellbinding trysts as you work your way through a labyrinth of romance and desire. Remember, the choices you make in the game will define your destiny, shaping your relationships with these captivating sorceresses and determining the steamy experiences that await you.



In this bewitching dating sim, your mission is to seduce and entice your way into the hearts and beds of the most captivating sorceresses. Unravel their secrets, master the art of magical seduction, and discover the untold pleasures that await you. Will you have the prowess and charm to conquer the hearts of these alluring witches, or will you be left yearning for more? Only time will tell as you embark on this steamy, spellbinding adventure.

Features:


  • Adult-only content: Immerse yourself in a seductive and mature dating sim experience designed exclusively for adult players.
  • Magic World universe: Explore an enchanting and mystical setting, rich in lore and inspired by the magical world of witchcraft and wizardry.
  • Diverse characters: Engage with a captivating cast of bewitching witches, each with their own unique personalities, backgrounds, and desires.
  • Alluring spells: Master a variety of seductive spells and enchantments that will aid you in your quest to win the hearts of the sorceresses.
  • Branching storylines: Navigate a dynamic narrative with multiple branching paths, influenced by the choices you make throughout the game.
  • Steamy encounters: Experience sensual and intimate moments as you cultivate passionate connections with the enchanting characters.
  • Relationship progression: Develop and deepen your relationships with the sorceresses through meaningful dialogue, choices, and actions.
  • Engaging gameplay: Participate in mini-games and side quests that test your magical prowess and decision-making skills, adding depth to the overall experience..

Explore the carnal desires of bewitching witches, learn alluring spells, and form passionate connections. Your choices define your destiny; seduce and entice your way into the hearts and beds of captivating sorceresses.

English*, Japanese, Korean, Russian, Simplified Chinese, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Vietnamese, Greek, Danish, Traditional Chinese, Norwegian, Dutch, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Thai, Turkish, Hungarian, Ukrainian, Finnish, Czech, Swedish, Indonesian, Spanish - Latin America
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7 or above
  • Processor: Intel or AMD
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Direct X compatible
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
